meta.title: ImuChat — European Sovereign Super-App
meta.description: Messaging, office suite, Alice AI and ImuArena competitions. Hosted in Europe, GDPR-native, zero ads.
meta.og_title: ImuChat — Chat. Work. Everything in one app.
meta.og_description: The European super-app uniting messaging, AI, productivity and gaming. Sovereign, GDPR-native, hosted in EU.

hero.subheadline: ImuChat combines messaging, office suite, AI and gaming in a European super-app that respects your privacy.

features.label: Features
features.subtitle: Not just another chat app. A complete platform.

messaging.name: Messaging
messaging.desc: 1:1 chat, groups, communities, HD audio/video calls, file sharing and stories.

alice.name: Alice AI
alice.desc: Your contextual AI assistant: summaries, writing, translation, analysis. Data stays in EU.

office.name: ImuOffice
office.desc: Sovereign office suite: ImuDocs, Sheets, Slides, Drive. Microsoft 365 alternative.

store.name: ImuStore
store.desc: Install mini-apps à la carte to enrich your experience as needed.

arena.name: ImuArena
arena.desc: Community competitions across 6 domains: gaming, creative, tech, writing, quiz, photo.

themes.name: Themes & Imu
themes.desc: Deep customization: themes, animated backgrounds, Live2D avatars and Imu the mascot.

eu.title: European sovereignty
eu.desc: Data hosted exclusively in France and Germany. No dependency on US tech giants.

privacy.title: GDPR-native
privacy.desc: E2E encryption, zero ads, zero data resale. Your privacy, truly protected.

open.title: Open-core
open.desc: Open architecture. Developers can build modules for the ImuChat Store.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No credit card required. Scale when you're ready.
pricing.enterprise_note: Are you a business or institution?

footer.tagline: European sovereign super-app. Communication, work and entertainment in one place.
